description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbed neckline, \embroidered skull on the left chest and brand name on the back neckFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colors Do not bleach Tumble dry on low Do not iron on embellishments Indulge in a little bit of suppressed heartbreak with this black tee from ed hardy. The original embroidered skull is inspired by the artwork of the legendary tattoo artist. The words "Love kills slowly" is the universal anthem of the heartbroken. Team this with a black leather jacket and faded denims for unsurpassed cool. Add on a pair of black leather boots to complete the look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
